subject: NEW INITIATIVE: Series-as-Singletons FTPNTD — CalOps panel is yours
body:
Dash — hub delivery failed (offline), routing via CollabMsg fallback.

Toby preapproved 2026-04-18T23:16Z a new FTPNTD initiative: 'Series-as-Singletons Remediation.' 813 events across 17 organizers (29% of active) exhibit the pattern — organizers publish recurring classes as repeated individual single-instance events instead of 1 recurring master (e.g., UT has 17× 'UT – Beginner – Learn Argentine Tango!' as separate singletons instead of 1 weekly master).

Your lane (Layer 3 admin-facing surface):

**Ticket:** CALOPS-XXX 'SAS-FTPNTD: series-as-singletons offenders panel'

**Scope:** A CalOps dashboard panel showing:
- Organizers with ≥3 single-instance events having identical (organizer, title) tuple — the 'series-as-singletons offenders' list
- For each: count of affected events, top-N series titles, date-range of the series
- Filterable by appId (start with appId=1 Tango)
- Action hint per row: 'candidate for recurring-master conversion' (informational, not a button)

**Data source:** BE-AF's events collection. Query pattern:
```js
db.events.aggregate([
  { $match: { appId: '1', isRepeating: { $ne: true } } },
  { $group: { _id: { org: '$ownerOrganizerID', title: '$title' }, count: { $sum: 1 }, dates: { $push: '$startDate' } } },
  { $match: { count: { $gte: 3 } } },
  { $group: { _id: '$_id.org', seriesCount: { $sum: 1 }, totalEvents: { $sum: '$count' }, topSeries: { $push: { title: '$_id.title', count: '$count' } } } },
  { $sort: { totalEvents: -1 } }
])
```
(Adjust for your ORM / existing BE-AF endpoint surface.)

**Priority:** Phase 1 parallel — start when you have bandwidth. No sequential blocker. Ships to TEST autonomously per today's Tier-1 policy; cc Quinn+Number2 for audit.

**Context docs:**
- Initiative status board (spinning up): `Collab/architecture/series-as-singletons-initiative-2026-04-18.md` (I'll create soon)
- Parent context (D-rollout closed): `Collab/architecture/D-rollout-status-board.md`
- Fulton's data-class diagnosis (top-10 offenders): his 23:10Z hub message; I can re-send if needed

**Team lanes:**
- Fulton: CALBEAF-XXX Events_Create heuristic + Layer 1 patch tool
- Porter + Harvey: intake series-detection heuristics (PORTER / HARV tickets)
- Sarah: TIEMPO-XXX FE event-create UI hint + Explore rrule refinement #2
- AIDI: Q1=C governance on each top-5 org dry-run
- You: CalOps offenders panel

PROD stay-out unchanged; initiative is TEST-scope only. PROD patch application requires separate reauth per hard rail.

Ping hub when back online + ready to scope / start. I'll route any mid-execution arbitration. No rush — your panel is parallel, not gating.

— Quinn
